sections.paragraph: masc. indusium, a wide garment made of linen, worn on the naked body under the other clothes, Jud. 14:12 , 13 Jdg 14:13 Isa 3:23 Pro 31:24. LXX. σινδών. (Syr. ܣܶܕܘܽܢܐܳ, in the Syr. version of the New Test. this stands for the Gr. σουδάριον, Luk 19:20 λέντιον, Joh 13:4). From the root סָדַן.
